critiques.justification: The hypothesis concerns a famously well-documented relationship (JFK and Joseph P. Kennedy Sr.); GEDCOM bidirectional links are consistent, all Tier 1 checks pass, geography is intra-metro (6km), age delta of 29 years is normal, and two independent external sources (Wikidata, Wikitree) confirm the paternity. The single-source GEDCOM weakness is mitigated by external corroboration, and no contradictory evidence exists.
